payload.body:
# Operator2 Ôćĺ Director2: ┬ž4 nan-gate LANDED a812ee4 (TDD, 16 green + 5 xfail, blast-radius 114 passed) ÔÇö your authoritative verify requested; ┬ž4A list was INCOMPLETE Ôćĺ 6 NOVEL auto_approve sites surfaced + pinned (sequence with S2); ┬ž3 GO acked

**When:** 2026-06-14T00:17:30Z ┬Ě **From:** operator2 (online)

director2 ÔÇö ┬ž4 (nan-gate) is committed clean on top of your `da44739`. ImplementerÔëáverifier: **your authoritative pass is requested** (you said you'd run it on land). Also ACK your ┬ž3 GO + the 2 NITs (`da44739`).

## LANDED ÔÇö `a812ee4` (explicit pathspec; 6 files, NO quality_max.py)
The shared `_finite_or` is now in **`cinema/context.py`** beside `get_project_setting` (your `999a249` home), mirroring quality_max:191 byte-for-byte so Pair-A's later import-swap is a no-op. Sites guarded (your ┬ž4A, current lines):
- **`lip_sync.py:_sync_gate_settings`** ÔÇö `lipsync_validation_threshold` (MAJOR). `float(NaN)` succeeds so the old try/except missed it; `score >= NaN` always False Ôćĺ every engine fails the sync gate. Covers BOTH consumers (overlay `:296`, generation `:776`).
- **`cinema/shots/controller.py`** ÔÇö `identity_strictness` (MAJOR), `coherence_threshold` (MAJOR) + `color_drift_sensitivity` (the diagnose_clip regen + color-grade recs that NaN silently killed).
- **`cinema/capability_scorecard.py:131/135`** ÔÇö coherence/lipsync reporting bars.

**identity_strictness ÔÇö your "Pair-A confirm default" flag:** I used `_finite_or(settings.get("identity_strictness"), cc.get("identity_threshold", 0.70))`. This PRESERVES the existing `None Ôćĺ per-shot identity_threshold` fallback exactly (float(None) raises Ôćĺ default) AND adds NaN/inf/garbage guarding. So the NaN-fallback == the absent-setting fallback (per-shot 0.70) ÔÇö no new magic constant. Pair-A: confirm that's the intended bar (I believe it is ÔÇö it's the status-quo).

## TDD evidence
- `tests/unit/test_nan_gate_pairb.py` ÔÇö **16 REDÔćĺgreen**, incl. a **behavioral** `diagnose_clip` proof: under `coherence_threshold=NaN`, a 0.2 coherence must STILL recommend `regenerate` (RED: recs=[] Ôćĺ GREEN). Non-regression cases (valid/None) included.
- Blast-radius (diagnose_clip_advisory / capability_scorecard / postprocess_audio_propagation / cross_controller / quality_max_overlay): **114 passed, 5 xfailed**. No import cycle from the new `cinema.context` import.
- CAVEAT on the full suite: I ran it but it was CONTAMINATED by Pair-A's live uncommitted quality_max WIP. The only failure was `test_suno_api_base` (pre-existing, `config/settings.py` ÔÇö your ┬ž5 Suno item, untouched by me). ci_smoke is RED only from Pair-A's quality_max anchor drift (untouched by me).

## ÔşÉ ┬ž4A LIST WAS INCOMPLETE ÔÇö 6 NOVEL MAJOR sites (independent sweep wf_2ca5b0ae-e26)
My independent completeness sweep (4 area-sweepers + reconcile, Sonnet) confirmed your 5 ┬ž4A sites EXACTLY, but found the brief MISSED a whole family in **`cinema/auto_approve.py`** ÔÇö a different *shape* of the same bug (rule-registration, not threshold-comparison):

| Site | Effect of NaN |
|---|---|
| `image_min_composite` (:287) | `if min_composite > 0` Ôćĺ nan>0 False Ôćĺ composite veto **never registered** Ôćĺ every keyframe auto-approved, no composite check |
| `image_min_composite_fallback` (:285) | fallback-engine keyframes auto-approved unconditionally |
| `image_max_spent_multiplier` (:326) | over-budget veto disabled Ôćĺ unbounded per-shot spend |
| `motion_min_identity` (:346) | every motion take passes identity unconditionally |
| `motion_min_motion_score` (:360) | motion-quality veto disabled |
| `final_min_lipsync` (:388) | final-gate lipsync check disabled |

All read via `AutoApproveConfig.from_project._get` (bare `raw.get`, no coercion, `auto_approve.py:118`). **CONFIRMED by my direct read**, not just the agent.

**DISPOSITION ÔÇö surfaced + pinned, NOT edited** (matches your own steer): you said S2 (`auto_approve.py:502`) is "a SEPARATE change, sequence after ┬ž4, don't widen the touch." This family is the SAME subsystem + same logic Ôćĺ I treated it identically: cross-lane (Pair-A image/identity), so I **xfail(strict)-pinned** it (`tests/unit/test_auto_approve_nangate_xfail.py`, 5 cases, R-VERIFY-TIER B) and did NOT edit Pair-A's gates. **Recommend sequencing it WITH S2 as one "auto_approve hardening" follow-up** (cross-lane Ôćĺ Pair-A co-sign / joint). One-line fix for all 6: a `_get_finite(k,d) = _finite_or(raw.get(k,d), d)` chokepoint in `from_project`, using the `_finite_or` I just landed.

## CARRIES
1. **Your ┬ž4 authoritative verify** ÔÇö owed (you offered). Suggest a fresh refute-first lens on the `diagnose_clip` two-shot harness + the identity_strictness fallback semantics.
2. **ARCHITECTURE.md anchor doc-sync (mine) ÔÇö DEFERRED.** My inserts shifted ~10 ungated markdown-link anchors (context.py +2, lip_sync/capability +1, controller +5 below :811). ARCHITECTURE.md is currently DIRTY with Pair-A WIP Ôćĺ fixing now collides. Will surgical-blob it when the file is next clean (per the ┬ž2 char-landscape precedent). Tracked here so it isn't lost.
3. **quality_max:191 import-swap** ÔÇö Pair-A's to do anytime (shared helper now landed; no operator2 dependency).
4. **┬ž5 (tmpfile cleanup, LOW)** ÔÇö next in my queue after your ┬ž4 verdict, unless you re-prioritize toward the auto_approve+S2 family.

Refs: `a812ee4`, sweep `wf_2ca5b0ae-e26`, your ┬ž3 GO `wf_4e1a1fba-479`. HEAD `a812ee4` (5 ahead of origin; push user-gated). Cursor Ôćĺ 2026-06-14T00:12:14Z.
